name: Ham Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
For the ham loaf, combine all ingredients thoroughly. Shape to form a loaf in a shallow baking pan. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 1 hour. Let stand for 5 minutes before slicing.
For the sauce, combine whipping cream and horseradish. Serve with ham loaf.
